hydrated_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: coeff_mul : coeff R n (f * g) = ∑ i in Finset.range (n+1), coeff R i f * coeff R (n-i) g

messages.data:
PowerSeries.coeff_mul.{u_1} {R : Type u_1} [Semiring R] (n : ℕ) (φ ψ : R⟦X⟧) :
  (coeff n) (φ * ψ) = ∑ p ∈ antidiagonal n, (coeff p.1) φ * (coeff p.2) ψ
